ogTitle: Robertsons Beach vs Rochester: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Robertsons Beach and Rochester.
heading: Robertsons Beach vs Rochester — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Robertsons Beach, Victoria and Rochester, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rochester has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Robertsons Beach (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Robertsons Beach or Rochester safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Robertsons Beach has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Rochester scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Robertsons Beach scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Rochester scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Robertsons Beach or Rochester?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rochester has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
